markers: App.tsx orchestrates an education flow with home, study, quiz, and comparison modes.
services/geminiService.ts generates the fungi list, fungus details, quiz questions, shared features, and distinguishing annotations at runtime via Gemini.
components/StudyMode.tsx and components/ComparisonMode.tsx render AI-generated fungal images and study content.
components/QuizMode.tsx presents generated quiz questions with answer selection and scoring.
No local lecture corpus, algorithm dataset, or curated image asset folder was found; the simulator is AI-generated and API-driven.

summary.notes: The repository contains a complete mycology learning workflow, but the actual educational content is generated at runtime rather than stored as static source payloads.

images.evidence: generateFungusImage() calls Imagen and falls back to a placeholder URL if generation fails.
Renders fungus.imageUrl as the main study image for each organism.

tutorials.evidence: Controls welcome, selection, study, quiz, and comparison modes.
Presents overview, clinical features, and laboratory features for the selected fungus.
Displays generated multiple-choice questions and tracks progress through the quiz.
Compares fungi sharing a common feature and highlights distinguishing annotations.

dependencies: services/geminiService.ts depends on @google/genai, GEMINI_API_KEY, and network access.
App.tsx depends on getFungiList, getFungusDetails, generateFungusImage, generateQuiz, and getSharedFeatures.
StudyMode.tsx and ComparisonMode.tsx depend on imageUrl values produced by the Gemini/Imagen pipeline.
QuizMode.tsx depends on quizQuestions generated by the Gemini service.
recommendation: Stage the AI workflow and renderer components together if you want to preserve the simulator behavior. There is no standalone lecture archive, algorithm dataset, or local image corpus to migrate from this repo.
